name: PLNSPDETAY1
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[PLNSPDETAY1] AS 
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT     
      SF.SB_REF, 
      SH.SD_REF, 
      SH.STOK_REF, 
	  SH.VARYANT_REF, 
      ((SH.MIKTAR / SH.CARPAN1) * SH.CARPAN2) AS MIKTAR, 
      ((SH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR / SH.CARPAN1) * SH.CARPAN2) SEVK_EDILEN, 
      ((SH.MIKTAR / SH.CARPAN1) * SH.CARPAN2) - ((SH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR / SH.CARPAN1) * SH.CARPAN2) AS BEKLEYEN
      ,SEVK_STOK=(SELECT CONVERT(FLOAT,ISNULL(CONVERT(NUMERIC(24,8),SUM(MIKTAR)),0)) FROM AMBARTAKIP AT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE AT.STOK_REF = SH.STOK_REF AND AT.VARYANT_REF = SH.VARYANT_REF AND AT.AMBAR_KODU = SH.AMBAR_KODU) - ISNULL(ACKPLN.ACIK_MIKTAR, 0) - (((SH.MIKTAR / SH.CARPAN1) * SH.CARPAN2) - ((SH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR / SH.CARPAN1) * SH.CARPAN2))
FROM
    SIPARISHAREKETLERI SH WITH(NOLOCK) 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN SIPARISFISLERI SF WITH(NOLOCK) ON SF.SB_REF = SH.SB_REF 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN ACKPLN WITH(NOLOCK) ON ACKPLN.STOK_REF = SH.STOK_REF AND ACKPLN.VARYANT_REF = SH.VARYANT_REF AND ACKPLN.AMBAR_KODU = SH.AMBAR_KODU 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI PH WITH(NOLOCK) ON PH.SD_REF = SH.SD_REF AND PH.STATUS = 0 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN PLANLAMAFISLERI PF WITH(NOLOCK) ON PF.PB_REF = PH.PB_REF AND PF.STATUS = 0

WHERE
    SH.SIPARIS_TURU = 1 
    AND SH.KAPALI = 0 
    AND SF.KAPALI = 0 
    AND SH.MIKTAR - SH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR > 0 
    AND SH.CSUB = 0
    AND PF.PB_REF IS NULL
GROUP BY 
      SF.SB_REF, SH.SD_REF, SH.STOK_REF, SH.VARYANT_REF, SH.MIKTAR, SH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR, SH.CARPAN1, SH.CARPAN2, PH.PD_REF, PF.PB_REF,SH.AMBAR_KODU
      ,     ACKPLN.ACIK_MIKTAR
      
      UNION ALL
      
SELECT     
      SF.SB_REF, 
      SH.SD_REF, 
      SH.STOK_REF, 
	  SH.VARYANT_REF, 
      ((SH.MIKTAR / SH.CARPAN1) * SH.CARPAN2) AS MIKTAR, 
      ((SH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR / SH.CARPAN1) * SH.CARPAN2) SEVK_EDILEN, 
      ((SH.MIKTAR / SH.CARPAN1) * SH.CARPAN2) - ((SH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR / SH.CARPAN1) * SH.CARPAN2) AS BEKLEYEN
      ,SEVK_STOK=(SELECT ISNULL(SUM(STOK),0) FROM PLNALTSTOK1 AT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE AT.STOK_REF = SH.STOK_REF AND AT.VARYANT_REF = SH.VARYANT_REF AND AT.AMBAR_KODU = SH.AMBAR_KODU) - ISNULL(ACKPLN.ACIK_MIKTAR, 0) - (((SH.MIKTAR / SH.CARPAN1) * SH.CARPAN2) - ((SH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR / SH.CARPAN1) * SH.CARPAN2))
FROM
    SIPARISHAREKETLERI SH WITH(NOLOCK) 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN SIPARISFISLERI SF WITH(NOLOCK) ON SF.SB_REF = SH.SB_REF 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN ACKPLN WITH(NOLOCK) ON ACKPLN.STOK_REF = SH.STOK_REF AND ACKPLN.VARYANT_REF = SH.VARYANT_REF AND ACKPLN.AMBAR_KODU = SH.AMBAR_KODU 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI PH WITH(NOLOCK) ON PH.SD_REF = SH.SD_REF AND PH.STATUS = 0 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN PLANLAMAFISLERI PF WITH(NOLOCK) ON PF.PB_REF = PH.PB_REF AND PF.STATUS = 0

WHERE
    SH.SIPARIS_TURU = 1 
    AND SH.KAPALI = 0 
    AND SF.KAPALI = 0 
    AND SH.MIKTAR - SH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR > 0 
    AND SH.CSUB = 1
    AND PF.PB_REF IS NULL
    
GROUP BY 
      SF.SB_REF, SH.SD_REF, SH.STOK_REF, SH.VARYANT_REF, SH.MIKTAR, SH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR, SH.CARPAN1, SH.CARPAN2, PH.PD_REF, PF.PB_REF,SH.AMBAR_KODU
      ,     ACKPLN.ACIK_MIKTAR
      
      
      
      ) AS LIST 

WHERE SEVK_STOK>=0
